# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.3.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| 1.2.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| 1.1.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| 1.0.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not report vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues, discussions, pull requests, or any other public form of communication.**

Please directly email [dev.schuchkin.timur@gmail.com](mailto:dev.schuchkin.timur@gmail.com) to report vulnerabilities.
You can expect an initial response within **72 hours**.
